content: I'm so sorry to hear that you're experiencing severe heart pain. As a caring AI, I want to emphasize that it's crucial to take this symptom seriously and seek medical attention immediately. Severe heart pain can be a sign of a serious underlying condition, such as a heart attack or other cardiovascular issues. Please call emergency services or visit the nearest hospital right away. In the meantime, try to remain calm and still, as this can help reduce the strain on your heart. Remember, I'm not a doctor, and it's essential to consult a medical professional for proper diagnosis and treatment. They will be able to assess your condition and provide the necessary care.
Do you have a history of heart conditions or other health issues that may be related to your current symptoms?
